en.title: Writing assistant
en.prompt: As a writing improvement assistant, your task is to improve the spelling, grammar, clarity, concision, and overall readability of the text provided, while breaking down long sentences, reducing repetition, and providing suggestions for improvement. Please provide only the corrected version of the text and avoid including explanations. Please begin by editing the following text: [text to edit]
en.remark: For optimising the grammar, clarity and conciseness of text and improving readability.

metaTitle: AI Writing Assistant: Enhance Grammar & Clarity
metaDescription: Looking for a reliable writing assistant? Refine your text with this AI tool that improves grammar, clarity, and conciseness while reducing repetition for...

faq.q: How do I ask it to only fix grammar without rewriting my style?
faq.a: Before pasting your text, add a line like "only correct grammar and spelling, keep my word choice and sentence structure, do not rewrite." Otherwise the AI will default to what it considers "better" and polish away your personal voice along with the errors.

faq.q: What if the AI changes the meaning after rewriting?
faq.a: Put the original and the rewrite side by side and ask it to take one more pass: "check whether the rewrite shifts the original meaning, list every place where the meaning has drifted, and suggest replacement wording that preserves the intent." Polishing naturally introduces semantic drift, especially in long sentences and passages with turns of thought.
